issues.message: TS2305: Module '"@marigold/components"' has no exported member 'Box'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message:
TS2322: Type '(k: React.Key) => void' is not assignable to type '(key: Key | null) => void'.
  Types of parameters 'k' and 'key' are incompatible.
    Type 'Key | null' is not assignable to type 'Key'.
      Type 'null' is not assignable to type 'Key'.
issues.suggestion: Fix the TypeScript error reported by the compiler. The exact location is included in the issue location field.

issues.message: <ActionMenu> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <ActionMenu.Item>, <ActionMenu.Section>.

issues.message: <ActionMenu> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <ActionMenu.Item>, <ActionMenu.Section>.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

issues.message: <Switch> (a form field) is nested inside a <Table>. Tables are for tabular data, not form layout; fields lose their form semantics inside table cells.
issues.suggestion: Lay out form fields in Stack, Inline or Columns instead of a Table.

issues.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
issues.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

warnings.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
warnings.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

warnings.message: <Table> has no column marked rowHeader. Exactly one Table.Column should set rowHeader so screen readers can announce each row by it.
warnings.suggestion: Add rowHeader to the column that identifies each row, e.g. <Table.Column rowHeader>Name</Table.Column>.

warnings.message: <Switch> (a form field) is nested inside a <Table>. Tables are for tabular data, not form layout; fields lose their form semantics inside table cells.
warnings.suggestion: Lay out form fields in Stack, Inline or Columns instead of a Table.
